form.label: Blocked Domains
form.description: Analysis of blocked domains and ad blocking effectiveness

search.query: `pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") domain=$domain_filter$ | stats count as "Total Blocked", dc(domain) as "Unique Blocked Domains"

`pihole_base` ("query[" OR "gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") | eval is_blocked=if(match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|special domain|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|Rate-limiting|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::"), 1, 0) | stats sum(is_blocked) as blocked, count as total | eval block_rate=round((blocked/total)*100, 2) | fields block_rate

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") domain=$domain_filter$ | timechart span=30m count

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") domain=$domain_filter$ | eval block_source=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked"), "Gravity", match(_raw, "exactly denied"), "Exact Match", match(_raw, "Apple iCloud Private Relay"), "Apple Private Relay", match(_raw, "Designated Resolver"), "Designated Resolver", match(_raw, "special domain"), "Special Domain", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "Rate Limited", match(_raw, "is 0\.0\.0\.0"), "Null IPv4 Response", match(_raw, "is ::"), "Null IPv6 Response", 1=1, "Other" ) | stats count by block_source | sort -count

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting") domain=$domain_filter$ domain=* | stats count as "Block Count" by domain | sort -"Block Count" | head 20

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting") domain=$domain_filter$ domain=* | rex field=domain "\.(?<tld>[^\.]+)$" | stats count by tld | sort -count | head 15

`pihole_base` ("query[" OR "gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | eval is_blocked=if(match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|special domain|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|Rate-limiting|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::"), 1, 0) | stats sum(is_blocked) as blocked, count as total by hour | eval block_percentage=round((blocked/total)*100, 2) | sort hour | fields hour, block_percentage

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting" OR "is 0.0.0.0" OR "is ::") domain=$domain_filter$ | eval block_source=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked"), "Gravity", match(_raw, "exactly denied"), "Exact Match", match(_raw, "Apple iCloud Private Relay"), "Apple Private Relay", match(_raw, "Designated Resolver"), "Designated Resolver", match(_raw, "special domain"), "Special Domain", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "Rate Limited", match(_raw, "is 0\.0\.0\.0"), "Null IPv4", match(_raw, "is ::"), "Null IPv6", 1=1, "Other" ) | table _time, domain, query_type, block_source | sort -_time | head 100

`pihole_base` ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "Rate-limiting") domain=$domain_filter$ domain=* | rex field=domain "(?<domain_keyword>\w+)\." | stats count by domain_keyword | sort -count | head 50

div.p: xPi-Hole for Splunk | Copyright 2024-2025 xTechnix Inc. | All Rights Reserved
